title: A Girl's Desire
writer: C. Graham Baker, J. Raleigh Davies, Bradley J. Smollen
actors: Alice Calhoun, Warner Baxter, Frank Hall Crane
plot: Mrs. H. Jerome Browne, wife of a wealthy American, sends her daughter, Elizabeth, to a boarding school and goes to England to "find" a family tree, a title, and some heirlooms to go with them. Lady Dysart, widow of Lord Dysart, se...
